sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, try_strptime('Wed, 1 January 1992 - 08:38:40 PM', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %I:%M:%S %p'));
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = try_strptime('Thu, 2 February 1995 - 01:25:30 AM', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %I:%M:%S %p') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, try_strptime('Mon, 3 March 1997 - 05:15:15 PM', '%a, %-d %B %Y - %I:%M:%S %p') AS parsed_time FROM timestamps;
